name: Chiaki Nanami | Hypno Arcade Booth | REMAKE
description:
As you might see, this bot is a bit old, and there is a reason for that! This is actually an edit of a bot from @Darkestjvj. I decided to change some things around because I didn't really like the fact it was fully hypnosis. Sure, she was in the trance, but you couldn't necessarily control her in the way you would expect from hypnosis.

So this bot changes some things around to let you do precisely that! Yippee! Think of it like a remake, dare I say 2X2!! (made by a completely different person (and using the majority of the same personality) but ignore that). I even made a second scenario based off a comment where someone said they wanted to be put on the arcade machine! Chiaki acts kinda of out of character in that scenario, but then it's just like the hit Kodaka game Hundred Line!!!! (That was really funny, and I would be really happy if someone appreciated the joke....) I also added some extra stuff to chiaki's character and backstory of the Arcade Machine.

If the original creator wants me to take it down, I will.

As always, any suggestions? Put them in the comments!

Y'know I'm not even into hypnosis so it's kinda funny that I've already made 2 hypno bots (maybe I'm in denial!)

FullImage
creator: Turnover
